Scheduling software

Pull your availability from connected calendars, with a single keystroke, within whichever timezone suits your recipient best. No opening the calendar, no timezone maths, and it handles multiple execs too. It's completely private and sits locally on your machine, connecting only to Outlook and Google.

results.content:
Report

Mark Frain

NoSho.app

NoSho.app

Maker

@mohsinproduct Hi and thanks for the question. If we try read everything in a user calendar it would get confusing fast, as we would have to guess what’s personal, what’s work and what another booking system has already placed. Most appointment tools like Fresha or Timely are also push-only for the same reason. [...] Subscribe

NoSho.app

## Grow your waitlist and fill availability fast with deposits

315 followers

## Grow your waitlist and fill availability fast with deposits

315 followers

Visit website

Scheduling software

•

Advertising tools

•

One simple link for businesses to grow their waitlist and fill last-minute availability with deposits fast. Make the availability you want booked fast visible to customers with one click, stop promoting slots you have hidden in a booking system maze. No more chasing messages or posting Stories that vanish in 24 hours. Just share your NoSho profile, automatically notify customers when new slots are added and get booked securely.

@pasha\_tseluyko thank you, this can be used globally whenever Stripe is available, as this is the payment integration I’ve used. Main focus is currently the UK as this is where I live, but social media opens this up to everyone.

Report

Nikita Savchenko

Nice thing! It looks like I can't sync it with my calendar for free, can I?

Report

Mark Frain

NoSho.app

NoSho.app

Maker

@nikitaeverywhere Thank you! You are unable to sync to a calendar on the free plan, this is one of the PRO tools. Free allows you to take basic bookings which you will receive via email. PRO gives you payments, WhatsApp notifications, calendar sync, analytics and more.
